navigation_links.description: Homepage and starting point for shopping
Browse all fresh produce, including fruits, vegetables, and herbs
Browse pantry staples and subcategories such as Pasta & Grains
Browse frozen foods, including Vegetarian Meals and Family Meals
Browse snack foods, including snack bars and granola bars
Browse bakery items available for pickup or delivery
Browse household essentials such as laundry detergent
Set delivery or pickup preferences and delivery ZIP
View current deals, including Buy 2 Get 1 Free offers
Choose or change your preferred pickup store by ZIP
Learn more about the supermarket and its services
Customer service contact information and support
Help center and frequently asked questions
Details about delivery areas, pickup, and fulfillment options
Current promotions, deals, and coupon information
Information about data collection and privacy practices
Website, order, and promotion terms and conditions

promo_codes.description: Save 10% on cart orders of $50 or more on household items and more.
15% off your first online grocery order.
20% off for store staff members only.

stores.name: FreshMart South Plaza
stores.hours: Mon-Sat 8:00 AM - 10:00 PM; Sun 8:00 AM - 8:00 PM

categories.name: All Produce
categories.description: Fresh fruits, vegetables, and herbs including organic and conventional options.

categories.name: Pantry
categories.description: Shelf-stable pantry staples including pasta, grains, cereals, canned goods, and more.

categories.name: Frozen Foods
categories.description: Frozen meals, vegetables, desserts, and family-size options.

categories.name: Snacks
categories.description: Chips, crackers, snack bars, and other packaged snacks.

categories.name: Bakery
categories.description: Fresh breads, pastries, cakes, and other baked goods available for pickup or delivery.

categories.name: Household Essentials
categories.description: Cleaning supplies, paper products, laundry detergent, and other household items.

categories.name: Pasta & Grains
categories.description: Dry pasta, rice, quinoa, couscous, and other shelf-stable grains and sides.

categories.name: Frozen Family Meals
categories.description: Family-size frozen entrees and multi-serve meals suitable for weeknight dinners.

categories.name: Snack Bars & Granola Bars
categories.description: Snack bars, protein bars, and granola bars, including low-sugar and high-protein options.

categories.name: Breakfast Cereal
categories.description: Ready-to-eat breakfast cereals, including low-sugar and high-fiber varieties.

promotions.name: Buy 2 Get 1 Free Canned Tomatoes
promotions.description: Buy any 2 selected canned tomatoes and get a 3rd can of equal or lesser value free.

promotions.name: 10% Off Frozen Family Meals over $40
promotions.description: Automatically save 10% on qualifying Frozen Family Meals orders over $40.

products.name: FreshMart Classic Canned Tomatoes 14oz
products.description: Ripe vine-grown tomatoes peeled and packed in tomato juice, ideal for sauces, soups, and stews.

products.name: FreshMart Extra Virgin Olive Oil 1L
products.description: Cold-pressed extra virgin olive oil with a smooth, fruity flavor, perfect for salad dressings and cooking.

products.name: SunnyGrove Extra Virgin Olive Oil 1L
products.description: Mediterranean extra virgin olive oil with a robust flavor, ideal for dipping and roasting.

products.description: Single-serve spinach and ricotta lasagna with tomato sauce, made with vegetarian ingredients.

products.description: Frozen vegetarian chickpea and vegetable curry over brown rice in a mildly spiced sauce.

products.description: Hearty family-size meat lasagna with pasta, beef, ricotta, and mozzarella cheese, serves up to 6.

products.description: Creamy family-size macaroni and cheese baked with a crispy breadcrumb topping.

products.name: Family Feast Chicken Alfredo Pasta

products.name: Honey Oat Crunch Cereal

products.name: Multigrain Loops Cereal
products.description: Colorful multigrain cereal loops made with whole grains and 9 essential vitamins and minerals.

products.name: NutriBite Peanut Crunch Snack Bar

products.name: NutriBite Berry & Nut Snack Bar

products.name: Fresh Clean Liquid Laundry Detergent 100 oz
products.description: Concentrated liquid laundry detergent with a fresh clean scent, enough for 64 loads.

products.name: Artisan Sourdough Bread Loaf

products.name: Chocolate Chip Cookies 6-Pack

products.name: Blueberry Muffins 4-Pack
